Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of West Kowloon Corridor (Mei Foo bound) near West Kowloon Magistrates' Courts is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic queue on West Kowloon Corridor (Mei Foo bound) ends at West Kowloon Corridor near Cherry Street.   Traffic is congested now.

因交通意外，西九龍走廊(往美孚方向)近西九龍法院大樓的部份行車線仍然封閉。
